title: Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC): Agenda for October 4, 2021 web conference - Canada.ca
content:
## Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC): Agenda for October 4, 2021 web conference
This web conference will focus on a discussion of the state of the  evidence on efficacy and quality for health products containing cannabidiol  ( CBD ). Members will receive a presentation on current labelling and quality  requirements for natural and non-prescription health products to support  further discussions on CBD efficacy and potential related dosing ranges. The  meeting will conclude with an initial discussion on quality considerations for CBD .
Time Eastern Time    (ET)
Agenda – October 4, 2021 2:00 pm to 5:00 pm ET
